topic: Deep Review: 045-shared-daemon-suite-runner cocoindex_code MCP wiring (commit cddfbe4aa)

focus: D1 Correctness - two-client lifecycle, retry, partial-connect, routing, stderr capping

findingDetails.title: finally cleanup throws TypeError on null client
findingDetails.evidence: connection.client?.close().catch(() => {}) throws TypeError when client is null (partial connect failure) because null?.close() returns undefined and .catch() is not a method on undefined.
findingDetails.recommendation: Guard with null check: connection.client ? connection.client.close().catch(() => {}) : Promise.resolve()
findingDetails.scopeProof: Line 581 inside finally block; line 281-294 returns client:null on connect failure.

findingDetails.title: No timeout on client.connect()
findingDetails.evidence: await client.connect(transport) has no timeout wrapper unlike callTool at line 189-197. A hung daemon during handshake causes indefinite hang.
findingDetails.recommendation: Wrap in Promise.race with 60s timeout, emitting a diagnostic row on timeout.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Line 273 in connectSharedClient; compare with callTool timeout pattern at line 189-197.

findingDetails.title: parseObjectLiteral uses Function() constructor as JSON.parse fallback
findingDetails.evidence: Function('"use strict"; return (' + trimmed + ');')() evaluates arbitrary JS from playbook arguments.
findingDetails.recommendation: Replace with safe object-literal tokenizer or restrict playbook arguments to valid JSON.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Line 138 parseObjectLiteral; playbook files are trusted repo content but Function() is unnecessary.

findingDetails.title: responseFailureMessage may miss error patterns
findingDetails.evidence: Only checks response.isError, parsed.error, and parsed.success===false. Misses parsed.status==='error' and other patterns.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add broader error detection: check parsed.status, parsed.code, and log unrecognized shapes.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Line 203-209; consumed by callScenarioTool at line 230 to decide retry/return.

findingDetails.title: runGenericScenario fail-fast loses parallel-call information
findingDetails.evidence: Calls execute sequentially; first error returns immediately, skipping remaining calls in the scenario.
findingDetails.recommendation: Collect all call results before deciding verdict; report partial-success metrics.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Line 447-476 runGenericScenario; multi-call scenarios like 403/404/407 have 3-4 calls.

focus: D2 Security - command injection, Function() constructor, env propagation, stderr sensitivity

findingDetails.title: parseObjectLiteral uses Function() constructor (security dimension confirmed)
findingDetails.evidence: Function() constructor evaluates arbitrary JS from playbook args; Defense-in-Depth violation even for trusted repo content.
findingDetails.recommendation: Replace with safe tokenizer handling JSON-like literals only.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Line 138; consumed by parseScenarioToolCalls for playbook argument parsing.

findingDetails.title: Unconditional process.env propagation to subprocess daemons
findingDetails.evidence: ...process.env spreads all parent env vars (including potential secrets like GITHUB_TOKEN, OPENAI_API_KEY) to both daemon subprocesses.
findingDetails.recommendation: Pass only needed env vars (PATH, HOME, SPECKIT_RETRY_ENABLED, COCOINDEX_CODE_*) instead of spreading process.env.

findingDetails.title: Stderr capped logs may capture sensitive daemon output
findingDetails.evidence: Capped stderr logs written to tracked sandbox directory; could capture daemon output with file paths, query strings, or error stacks.
findingDetails.recommendation: Document sensitivity; add --no-stderr-log flag for operators.

focus: D3 Traceability - spec/doc alignment, continuity frontmatter, architecture decisions, slug naming, smoke evidence

findingDetails.title: Handover file describes 045 as PARTIAL, contradicting commit that flips to SHIPPED
findingDetails.evidence: Line 96: 045 shown as PARTIAL with 403 SKIP; lines 165-167: CocoIndex MCP not yet wired, P1 next-session task. Commit ships fix but handover text not updated.
findingDetails.recommendation: Update handover to reflect post-fix state or add note that handover describes pre-fix wave state.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Same commit includes both the fix and the contradictory handover.

findingDetails.title: Spec requirements REQ-002 and SC-001 only describe single-client architecture
findingDetails.evidence: REQ-002 and SC-001 mention only memory launcher; CocoIndex client described only in scope/risks sections, not in formal requirements.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add REQ-010 or update REQ-002 to cover CocoIndex client; update SC-001 to mention two daemon surfaces.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Lines 112 and 133 vs actual two-client implementation at run-mcp-direct.mjs:518-549.

findingDetails.title: Architecture tradeoff analysis (two transports vs proxy through memory) not documented
findingDetails.evidence: Key Decisions table documents chosen approach but not why proxy-through-memory alternative was rejected.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add decision record explaining tradeoffs: proxy adds latency hop, requires CocoIndex SDK in memory daemon, different lifecycle.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Lines 119-130 Key Decisions; answered questions at spec.md:33 states decision without rationale.

focus: D4 Maintainability - helper extraction, test coverage, readability, dependency surface

findingDetails.title: Test coverage uses fallback keys, not primary keys used in production
findingDetails.evidence: selectClientForServer test uses {memory,cocoindex} fallback keys; primary keys (spec_kit_memory, cocoindex_code) used in main() are untested.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add test with primary key names to ensure the primary path is covered.

findingDetails.title: Minimal test coverage: only 2 of 14+ helper functions tested
findingDetails.evidence: Only parseScenarioToolCalls and selectClientForServer tested. 12+ other functions untested.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add tests for parseScenarioList, normalizeArguments, isTransientCocoIndexFailure, responseFailureMessage edge cases.
findingDetails.scopeProof: 55-line test file covering 2 of 14+ functions in 591-line runner.

findingDetails.title: Deep relative import path fragile to file moves
findingDetails.evidence: ../../../../../_sandbox/... deep relative import breaks if either file moves.
findingDetails.recommendation: Use workspace alias or copy helpers to test helpers directory.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Line 6 import path with 6 parent traversals.

findingDetails.title: runGenericScenario mixes availability check, execution, and result assembly
findingDetails.evidence: 61-line function with three phases; call execution loop has deep nesting.
findingDetails.recommendation: Extract checkToolAvailability and executeScenarioCalls as pure functions for testability.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Lines 422-483; three distinct phases in one function.

focus: Stabilization pass - adversarial re-check of P1 findings, edge-case scan
